title: abeec Dinosaur Operation - Dinosaur Operation Game for Boys and girls - Board Game for Kids 6+ - Dinosaur Toy for Boys - Remove the Body Parts or Face the Buzzer
features: Classic Operation Game with a Roaring Twist! – Carefully remove dinosaur body parts using the included tweezers, but watch out! One wrong move and the buzzer sounds!
Perfect Family Board Game – Designed for 2+ players, this interactive dinosaur game brings fun, laughter, and friendly competition to family game nights, playdates, and parties.
The Ultimate Dinosaur Gift – A fantastic choice for dinosaur lovers! Whether for birthdays, Christmas, or special occasions, this dinosaur toy for boys and girls makes an exciting and unique gift.
Educational & Skill-Building – Enhances hand-eye coordination, concentration, and fine motor skills, making learning fun and engaging for kids aged 6 and up.
Great for Parties & Playdates – Keep kids entertained for hours with this hilarious and suspense-filled board game. A must-have for birthdays, sleepovers, and classroom activities.

It’s designed for 2 or more players, making it a fantastic choice for family game nights, playdates, or classroom activities. What age is this game suitable for? This game is recommended for children aged 6 and up. It's perfect for both kids and adults to enjoy together. Does the game require batteries? Yes, the game requires batteries to power the buzzer (batteries not included). Is this game a good gift for dinosaur lovers? Absolutely! With its dinosaur theme and fun gameplay, it's a great birthday or Christmas gift for any dino-loving child. How does the game help kids develop skills? It improves hand-eye coordination, fine motor skills, and patience as kids carefully extract pieces without triggering the buzzer! Also available as a Unicorn operation version.
